name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem. 0.31.0 (2026-04-21): Monorepo restructure. Public MCPs (cubit/build123d/gmsh/elf/radia-ngsolve/radia-interop) now all live under radia_mcp.* namespace. Private MCPs (ih/electromagnet/peec) split out to separate s:\mcp-server\ packages. 0.27.0 base: cubit_mesh_race_review (wait-all + shortlist sorted by min-Jacobian + persisted history) + cubit_mesh_apply_choice.
author: Kengo Sugahara
